decisions.summary: Python sidecar architecture: brain service (FastAPI) communicates with OpenClaw via HTTP
Embedding model: gemini-embedding-001 at 3072 dimensions (max Matryoshka resolution)
Full brain scope: memory + gut + consolidation + DMN + safety + bootstrap
PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector for all brain storage (replaces LanceDB)

tasks.title: Foundation: scaffold + schema + docker-compose
tasks.intent: Create the project skeleton so all subsequent phases have infrastructure to build on
tasks.deliverable: brain/ directory with Dockerfile, schema.sql, db.py, api.py + docker-compose.yml

tasks.title: Memory Core: store + retrieve + embed + OpenClaw plugin
tasks.intent: MVP proving end-to-end integration: store memories via brain API, retrieve them in OpenClaw context
acceptance_criteria: OpenClaw plugin injects memories into LLM context
verification: Send message to OpenClaw, verify memory appears in context

tasks.title: Entry/Exit Gate: ACT-R gate system + scratch buffer
tasks.intent: Replace naive auto-capture with intelligent filtering
verification: Send various content types, verify gate decisions

tasks.title: Identity Layers + Context Assembly
tasks.intent: Give agents persistent identity and structured context injection
acceptance_criteria: Context assembly returns identity + memories + structure

tasks.title: Gut Feeling: two-centroid emotional model
tasks.intent: Give agents an emotional compass based on experience divergence
acceptance_criteria: Gut summary appears in assembled context
verification: Send messages on different topics, verify centroid shift

tasks.title: Consolidation Engine: Tier 1 + Tier 2 background processing
tasks.intent: Background memory processing: decay, contradiction scan, pattern detection, insight generation
acceptance_criteria: Tier 2 runs hourly or on trigger

tasks.title: DMN / Idle Loop: spontaneous self-prompts + rumination
tasks.intent: Generate shower thoughts during agent idle time
acceptance_criteria: OpenClaw plugin polls and surfaces thoughts

tasks.title: Safety Monitor: ceilings + rate limiters + circuit breakers
Bootstrap Readiness: 10-milestone maturation tracking
tasks.intent: Track new agent development from blank slate to fully mature
acceptance_criteria: Bootstrap prompt injected for new agents
verification: Store + retrieve + consolidate, verify milestones unlock
